root_text.an7.21:1.2: ekaṁ samayaṁ bhagavā vesāliyaṁ viharati sārandade cetiye.
root_text.an7.21:1.3: Atha kho sambahulā licchavī yena bhagavā tenupasaṅkamiṁsu; upasaṅkamitvā bhagavantaṁ abhivādetvā ekamantaṁ nisīdiṁsu. Ekamantaṁ nisinne kho te licchavī bhagavā etadavoca:
root_text.an7.21:1.5: Taṁ suṇātha, sādhukaṁ manasi karotha, bhāsissāmī”ti.
root_text.an7.21:1.6: “Evaṁ, bhante”ti kho te licchavī bhagavato paccassosuṁ.
root_text.an7.21:2.2: Yāvakīvañca, licchavī, vajjī abhiṇhaṁ sannipātā bhavissanti sannipātabahulā;
root_text.an7.21:2.3: vuddhiyeva, licchavī, vajjīnaṁ pāṭikaṅkhā, no parihāni.
root_text.an7.21:3.1: Yāvakīvañca, licchavī, vajjī samaggā sannipatissanti, samaggā vuṭṭhahissanti, samaggā vajjikaraṇīyāni karissanti;
root_text.an7.21:3.2: vuddhiyeva, licchavī, vajjīnaṁ pāṭikaṅkhā, no parihāni.
root_text.an7.21:4.1: Yāvakīvañca, licchavī, vajjī apaññattaṁ na paññāpessanti, paññattaṁ na samucchindissanti, yathāpaññatte porāṇe vajjidhamme samādāya vattissanti;
root_text.an7.21:4.2: vuddhiyeva, licchavī, vajjīnaṁ pāṭikaṅkhā, no parihāni.
root_text.an7.21:5.1: Yāvakīvañca, licchavī, vajjī ye te vajjīnaṁ vajjimahallakā te sakkarissanti garuṁ karissanti mānessanti pūjessanti, tesañca sotabbaṁ maññissanti;
root_text.an7.21:5.2: vuddhiyeva, licchavī, vajjīnaṁ pāṭikaṅkhā, no parihāni.
root_text.an7.21:6.1: Yāvakīvañca, licchavī, vajjī yā tā kulitthiyo kulakumāriyo tā na okassa pasayha vāsessanti;
root_text.an7.21:6.2: vuddhiyeva, licchavī, vajjīnaṁ pāṭikaṅkhā, no parihāni.
root_text.an7.21:7.1: Yāvakīvañca, licchavī, vajjī yāni tāni vajjīnaṁ vajjicetiyāni abbhantarāni ceva bāhirāni ca tāni sakkarissanti garuṁ karissanti mānessanti pūjessanti, tesañca dinnapubbaṁ katapubbaṁ dhammikaṁ baliṁ no parihāpessanti;
root_text.an7.21:7.2: vuddhiyeva, licchavī, vajjīnaṁ pāṭikaṅkhā, no parihāni.
root_text.an7.21:8.1: Yāvakīvañca, licchavī, vajjīnaṁ arahantesu dhammikā rakkhāvaraṇagutti susaṁvihitā bhavissati:
root_text.an7.21:8.2: ‘kinti anāgatā ca arahanto vijitaṁ āgaccheyyuṁ, āgatā ca arahanto vijite phāsuṁ vihareyyun’ti;
root_text.an7.21:8.3: vuddhiyeva, licchavī, vajjīnaṁ pāṭikaṅkhā, no parihāni.
root_text.an7.21:9.1: Yāvakīvañca, licchavī, ime satta aparihāniyā dhammā vajjīsu ṭhassanti, imesu ca sattasu aparihāniyesu dhammesu vajjī sandississanti;
root_text.an7.21:9.2: vuddhiyeva, licchavī, vajjīnaṁ pāṭikaṅkhā, no parihānī”ti.

translation_text.an7.21:1.2: At one time the Buddha was staying near Vesālī, at the Sārandada Shrine.
translation_text.an7.21:1.3: Then several Licchavis went up to the Buddha, bowed, sat down to one side, and the Buddha said to these Licchavis:
translation_text.an7.21:1.4: “Licchavis, I will teach you these seven principles that prevent decline.
translation_text.an7.21:1.5: Listen and apply your mind well, I will speak.”
translation_text.an7.21:2.1: “And what are the seven principles that prevent decline?
translation_text.an7.21:2.2: As long as the Vajjis meet frequently and have many meetings,
translation_text.an7.21:2.3: they can expect growth, not decline.
translation_text.an7.21:3.1: As long as the Vajjis meet in harmony, leave in harmony, and carry on their business in harmony,
translation_text.an7.21:3.2: they can expect growth, not decline.
translation_text.an7.21:4.1: As long as the Vajjis don’t make new decrees or abolish existing decrees, but undertake and follow the ancient Vajjian traditions as they have been decreed,
translation_text.an7.21:4.2: they can expect growth, not decline.
translation_text.an7.21:5.1: As long as the Vajjis honor, respect, esteem, and venerate Vajjian elders, and think them worth listening to,
translation_text.an7.21:5.2: they can expect growth, not decline.
translation_text.an7.21:6.1: As long as the Vajjis don’t forcibly abduct the women or girls of the clans and make them live with them,
translation_text.an7.21:6.2: they can expect growth, not decline.
translation_text.an7.21:7.1: As long as the Vajjis honor, respect, esteem, and venerate the Vajjian shrines, whether inner or outer, not neglecting the proper spirit-offerings that were given and made in the past,
translation_text.an7.21:7.2: they can expect growth, not decline.
translation_text.an7.21:8.1: As long as the Vajjis organize proper protection, shelter, and security for perfected ones, so that
translation_text.an7.21:8.2: more perfected ones might come to the realm and those already here may live in comfort,
translation_text.an7.21:8.3: they can expect growth, not decline.
translation_text.an7.21:9.1: As long as these seven principles that prevent decline last among the Vajjis, and as long as the Vajjis are seen following them,
translation_text.an7.21:9.2: they can expect growth, not decline.”

variant_text.an7.21:9.1: vajjīsu ṭhassanti → vattissanti (mr) | sandississanti → sandissanti (bj, mr)
